allow: Bash(bun -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); const deps={...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; const toCheck=[''react-i18next'',''i18next'',''@mantine/form'',''@tiptap/extension-youtube'',''@excalidraw/excalidraw'',''react-drawio'',''react-clear-modal'']; toCheck.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k+'':'', deps[k]||''NOT INSTALLED''\)\);}\);")
